hero.tagline_accent: We always show you where the information comes from.
hero.description: Every topic has more than one side — kebab.news shows them all. The community decides what gets investigated. We surface different perspectives, back every claim with primary sources, and make uncertainty visible. For a more mindful relationship with information.

banner.text: Every report is AI-researched and human-verified. Every statement linked directly to its source.

transparent.title: Transparency
transparent.body: Every published claim traces back to a primary source — one click, directly, no detours.

community.title: Community-Driven
community.body: The community decides which topics get investigated. No editor-in-chief, no agenda — just votes.

open.title: Open Source
open.body: MIT licensed. Public repository from day one. If you don't trust us, read the code.

steps.b: You throw a topic into the ring.
The community decides what gets investigated.
AI gathers primary sources. Humans verify.
Report goes live — with sources, methodology, and everything we don't know.

trustStatement.heading: Why you shouldn't just trust us either
trustStatement.body: We make decisions too — which sources, how to frame questions, which AI. That's why we make all of it visible.

items.label: Check the sources
items.text: Every source analysis includes direct links to the original documents. Read them yourself.

items.label: Uncertainty is visible
items.text: Conflicting data or missing evidence is explicitly flagged — not hidden.

items.label: How this report was made
items.text: Every report includes a methodology section: sources used, sources excluded, data date, AI or human verification.

items.label: Objectivity filter
items.text: Emotional language in questions is reduced to make them verifiable — not a claim of neutrality.
